title: 8 Herbal Essential Oils to Alleviate Asthmatic Cough
description: Piper nigrum essential oils, also known as black pepper essential oil, can help with cough due to its natural anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The oil contains a high concentration of compounds like limonene, beta-pinene, and myrcene, which help to break down and clear mucus from the airways, making it easier to breathe and cough. The anti-inflammatory properties also help to reduce swelling and irritation in the throat and lungs, providing relief from coughing. To use Pip...
